name: azure-starter
description: Composable Claude skills for scaffolding and deploying consumption-priced, low-cost Azure web apps. Orchestrator + 13 single-purpose sub-skills covering Bicep, OIDC, SQL migrations, SWA, FC1, Container Apps + Jobs, Storage lifecycle, ACS Email, App Insights, multi-tenant, cost guardrails, troubleshooting, and a learnings-feedback loop. Complementary to Microsoft's azure-skills plugin.
